data.description: Report #4/#5: the binding/invalidation rule (verified_at_sha + material_fingerprint + regver + reopen + pins, ALL must hold) is correct but undocumented. Report #7/#1: audit show's plan_reviews is the REVIEW_RESULT sidecar HISTORY (newest-first, pruned), NOT the signed-attestation status. Report #3: --check reports credentials, not ticket status. AC: a docs/ attestation-lifecycle page states the boolean currency rule + what invalidates + re-gate guidance; audit show help/docs state history-not-status + newest-first; --check help disclaims attestation inspection and points to --status.
data.title: Document the attestation lifecycle + audit show scope + --check help (#1,#3,#4,#5,#7)
